message:
fix(pages): fix listener leaks and destroyed-state guards in virtual list and conversation

Properly teardown document keydown listeners on conversation clear/lock,
fix race conditions in ensureAttachmentsReady with load ID checks, guard
all virtual list callbacks against post-destroy invocation, and clear
search with reloadRecent on route change vs cleanup.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
